SEARCH
Package net.sf.jailer.enhancer

Klasse HelperTableEnhancer

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.enhancer.HelperTableEnhancer
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
ScriptEnhancer
public class HelperTableEnhancer extends Object implements ScriptEnhancer
Inserts DDL for helper tables.
Autor:
Ralf Wisser

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    HelperTableEnhancer()
     

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    addComments(Writer script, ScriptType scriptType, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, EntityGraph entityGraph, Set<Table> progress, ExecutionContext executionContext)
    Adds nothing.
    void
    addEpilog(Writer script, ScriptType scriptType, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, EntityGraph entityGraph, Set<Table> progress, ExecutionContext executionContext)
    Drops the JL_DUAL helper table at the bottom of the script if it was needed.
    void
    addProlog(Writer script, ScriptType scriptType, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, EntityGraph entityGraph, Set<Table> progress, ExecutionContext executionContext)
    Creates and populates the JL_DUAL helper table at the top of the script if needed.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • HelperTableEnhancer

      public HelperTableEnhancer()

  • Methodendetails

    • addComments

      public void addComments(Writer script, ScriptType scriptType, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, EntityGraph entityGraph, Set<Table> progress, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws IOException, SQLException
      Adds nothing.
      Angegeben von:
      addComments in Schnittstelle ScriptEnhancer
      Parameter:
      script - to write into the script
      scriptType - the type of the script
      session - for executing SQL-statements in the source-DB
      targetDBMSConfiguration - configuration of the target DBMS
      progress - the export progress
      Löst aus:
      IOException
      SQLException

    • addEpilog

      public void addEpilog(Writer script, ScriptType scriptType, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, EntityGraph entityGraph, Set<Table> progress, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws IOException, SQLException
      Drops the JL_DUAL helper table at the bottom of the script if it was needed.
      Angegeben von:
      addEpilog in Schnittstelle ScriptEnhancer
      Parameter:
      script - to write into the script
      scriptType - the type of the script
      session - for executing SQL-statements in the source-DB
      targetDBMSConfiguration - configuration of the target DBMS
      progress - the export progress
      Löst aus:
      IOException
      SQLException

    • addProlog

      public void addProlog(Writer script, ScriptType scriptType, Session session, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration, EntityGraph entityGraph, Set<Table> progress, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws IOException, SQLException
      Creates and populates the JL_DUAL helper table at the top of the script if needed.
      Angegeben von:
      addProlog in Schnittstelle ScriptEnhancer
      Parameter:
      script - to write into the script
      scriptType - the type of the script
      session - for executing SQL-statements in the source-DB
      targetDBMSConfiguration - configuration of the target DBMS
      progress - the export progress
      Löst aus:
      IOException
      SQLException
